title: Customer 'cannot complete checkout' (Acme Corp, 2400 users)
body: Enterprise customer Acme Corp (2,400 seats) reporting that none of their users can complete checkout as of 07:25 UTC. They've sent screenshots showing a spinner that never resolves on the payment confirmation step. Other customers do not appear affected — this looks tenant-specific. Acme's CTO is on a call with our CSM in 25 minutes.

triage.likely_cause: tenant-config-service v3.2.1 enabled the guest-checkout feature flag for cohort B (includes Acme Corp) 21 minutes before the incident, exposing the known NPE at PaymentService.java:142 for Acme users
recommended_actions: Roll back tenant-config-service v3.2.1 to v3.2.0 immediately to disable the guest-checkout flag for cohort B — this unblocks Acme Corp without a full payment-service rollback
Apply null check hotfix at PaymentService.java:142: guard customer.savedPaymentMethod before dereference, falling back to request's paymentMethodToken for guest flows
Page on-call and notify Acme Corp's CSM — CTO is on a call in 25 minutes
Verify no other cohort B tenants have opened incidents (flag was enabled for the full cohort)
triage.reasoning: tenant-config-service v3.2.1 deployed at 07:12 UTC enabled the 'guest-checkout' feature flag for cohort B, which includes Acme Corp — 21 minutes before this incident opened at 07:33 UTC. payment-service v4.8.2 (deployed the prior day) introduced guest checkout support but contains the documented NPE at PaymentService.java:142 where customer.savedPaymentMethod is null for guest users. Only Acme Corp is affected because they are in cohort B; other tenants without the flag see normal checkout. Fastest fix is rolling back tenant-config-service to v3.2.0 to pull the flag; a code hotfix at PaymentService.java:142 must follow before re-enabling.
